description: Generic retail/commercial banking priors. Protects money-movement and account business calls; only ADDS protection, so it is safe even on a partial path match.
llmFlowNotes: Banking: money-movement calls (transfer, payment, wire, ACH, bill-pay) are the business objective — NEVER disable one to reach green. A green run must have executed them with valid assertions on the returned confirmation/reference id.

Banking: expect step-up/strong-customer-authentication (MFA/OTP/3-D Secure). Treat OTP/MFA challenge responses as auth producers; the challenge id and device/session binding are server-issued and must be correlated, not replayed as literals.

Banking: many APIs require a per-request Idempotency-Key. If present, mint a fresh one per iteration (native __UUID) rather than replaying the recorded key, or the server will return the first (stale) result.
Banking: account numbers, amounts and beneficiary ids are business inputs — parameterize from CSV per the workload model; do not correlate them.
expectations: Money-movement + account endpoints protected as business calls
